🌴 Nosy Be, Madagascar

Discover Madagascar's
Hidden Gems

Expert-guided tours through spice plantations, ancient baobab forests, and pristine island shores. Your adventure begins in Nosy Be.

About Us

Your Local Guides
in Nosy Be

We are a small, passionate team of local guides born and raised in the Nosy Be archipelago. With deep knowledge of Madagascar's unique ecosystems, culture, and hidden corners, we craft authentic experiences that go far beyond the tourist trail.

From the fragrant vanilla and cocoa plantations of the mainland to the baobab-studded landscapes of the west coast, every tour is designed to connect you with the real Madagascar.

500+ Happy Travellers
8+ Years of Experience
100% Local Guides
⭐ Top-rated on Google
Our Tours

Testimonials

What Our Travellers Say

Don't just take our word for it — here's what guests from around the world have to say about their time with Nosy Be Tours.

★★★★★
"Absolutely magical experience! Our guide was incredibly knowledgeable about the local flora and the vanilla plantation was breathtaking. The baobabs were unlike anything we'd ever seen."
S

Sarah & James

🌍 United Kingdom

★★★★★
"Une expérience inoubliable! Le tour de cacao et vanille était parfait — des paysages magnifiques et un guide passionné. Je recommande vivement."
M

Marie-Claire

🌍 France

★★★★★
"Perfect organisation, stunning landscapes, and the freshest vanilla I have ever tasted. Will definitely book again next time we're in Madagascar!"
T

Thomas B.

🌍 Germany

★★★★★
"The baobab sunset was the highlight of our entire Madagascar trip. Our guide knew every tree by name. An unforgettable afternoon."
A

Amelia R.

🌍 Australia
